subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou beholdest my turning towards Thy horizon and my orientation to the lights of Thy Countenance, and my rising to serve Thee and Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری اقبالی الی افقک و توجهی الی انوار وجهک و قیامی علی خدمتک و خدمه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
